context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the ecto-nested-associations instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill before writing ANY nested association or multi-table code.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `cast_assoc/3` for has_many/has_one** — never manually insert children in a separate step

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `Ecto.Multi` for operations spanning multiple unrelated tables** — do NOT use `Ecto.Multi` for nested associations

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Always create indexes on foreign key columns**

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `on_replace: :delete` in `cast_assoc` for list management** — allows removing items by omitting them

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Always pattern-match on both success and error tuples from `Repo.transaction/1`:
